facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 220 reviews. SORI Restaurant is putting up numbers that most places in Phu Quoc can't touch.

This isn't a fluke. 220 people took the time to rate it, and the score barely moved. That kind of consistency is rare on the island.

Add it to your list before your trip. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
